'''Luah''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who served as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Motti's]] assistant on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Since he was an assistant to the admiral, Luah warned his old friend [[Nast Hoberd]] about the forthcoming inspections before his station could prepare his reputation as supreme commander.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
